issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and other workflows
issues.desc: HAs and TCs were receiving double tasks for Loan Simple leads across multiple workflows including post-referral and pre-referral. The issue was caused by a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: LO name not updating in automated emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO instead of the updated one. The issue was identified on a deal where Julie Yocum was the new LO but emails still showed Paul. The fix was handled by Luis on the product side.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually resend the relevant automated emails with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks continuing after deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters did not include these statuses as unenrollment or suppression criteria. A tweak to the filters was made to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks that were incorrectly generated for deals marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. This was because deal stage 'Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include the Offer Accepted stage.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks for referrals made after March 18
issues.desc: A HA reported receiving no tasks after a referral was made and accepted on March 18th. The root cause was identified as an error in how data was being pulled, preventing the workflow filter from evaluating correctly. The issue was escalated to product for resolution.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll affected deals into the post-referral workflow and review any tasks that should have been generated since March 18.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent at Offer Accepted stage before closing info available
issues.desc: An SMS notifying the buyer of their credit amount was being triggered at the Offer Accepted stage before closing information had been submitted, resulting in the credit amount being missing from the message. The SMS should only send at the Sale Pending stage when the credit amount can be calculated. It was confirmed to be a dash-triggered communication and was referred to the product team.
issues.workaround: For buyers who received the incomplete credit SMS during the impact window, manually send a follow-up message with the correct credit amount once closing information is submitted.
